generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw a local news report about how our community's emergency response teams were able to stop a potential threat last month thanks to expanded security powers. The reporter interviewed a family who was directly affected - they said they felt much safer knowing authorities had the tools they needed. Makes you think about how important it is to give our first responders every advantage they need to keep us safe. #CommunitySafety #SupportOurHeroes
